analysis_result: PTPRD mutation frequency in MPNST-G2 tumors: 2/7 (28.6%). This matches the paper's reported 2/7.
denominator_used: N = 7; definition: MPNST_G2 samples with WES data (per MOESM4 Clinical Data sheet, filtered on Methylation_Group='MPNST_G2' and WES='X'). Barcodes constructed as 'Tumor_' + WES label: Tumor_M1677, Tumor_RT1933, Tumor_M2325, Tumor_M2377, Tumor_M2491, Tumor_497419, Tumor_1019413.
assumptions_made: Non-synonymous classifications include: Missense_Mutation, Nonsense_Mutation, Frame_Shift_Del, Frame_Shift_Ins, Splice_Site, In_Frame_Del, In_Frame_Ins, Translation_Start_Site, Nonstop_Mutation (excluding Silent); FILTER=PASS applied (all rows in MOESM5 have FILTER=PASS); samples counted once even if multiple PTPRD mutations present; barcodes constructed per data context as 'Tumor_' + WES label column from MOESM4.
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
- MOESM4 Clinical Data (108 rows x 15 columns): used to identify MPNST_G2 WES samples
- MOESM5 Supplementary Table 2 MAF (7457 rows x 123 columns): somatic mutation calls

B. COHORT DEFINITION
- Filter 1: Methylation_Group == 'MPNST_G2' AND WES == 'X' -> 7 samples
- WES labels: ['M1677', 'RT1933', 'M2325', 'M2377', 'M2491', '497419', '1019413']
- Constructed barcodes: ['Tumor_M1677', 'Tumor_RT1933', 'Tumor_M2325', 'Tumor_M2377', 'Tumor_M2491', 'Tumor_497419', 'Tumor_1019413']
- All 7 barcodes confirmed present in MOESM5 MAF

C. VARIABLE CODING
- Hugo_Symbol == 'PTPRD'
- Variant_Classification in non-synonymous set (9 classes, excluding Silent)
- FILTER == 'PASS' (all 7457 rows are PASS)
- Tumor_Sample_Barcode in the 7 MPNST_G2 barcodes

D. COMPUTATION
- Applied filter chain to MOESM5 MAF
- Number of mutation rows matching: 2
- Unique samples with at least one PTPRD non-syn PASS mutation: 2
- Samples: ['Tumor_1019413', 'Tumor_M1677']

E. RESULT
- Frequency: 2/7 = 28.6%
- This matches the paper's reported 2/7.

F. CAVEATS
- Non-syn classification includes splice-site and stop_lost variants; changing the set could alter counts. 
- All MAF rows have FILTER=PASS, so that filter did not reduce counts.
- Counted samples (patients), not mutation events.
